open_questions: What distinguishes specificity from precision in prompt engineering?
At what point does specificity become overspecification?
How does specificity interact with model capability tiers?
What makes specificity behave differently in single-turn vs agentic contexts?
research_notes: OpenAI prompt engineering guide emphasizes specificity as primary lever for output quality
Anthropic docs discuss specificity in context of instruction following
Research on instruction-tuned models shows specificity reduces output variance
Common failure: specificity applied to format but not to content criteria
In agent workflows, specificity in delegation prevents scope creep and reduces handoff errors
